title: Goudaea chrysostachys
taxonomy: Goudaea chrysostachys is classified in the family Blechnaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the beech ferns or chain ferns. The genus Goudaea belongs to the order Polypodiales, and the species G. chrysostachys is a unique member of this group. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, including its leaf structure and growth habits. Further research is needed to confirm the specific relationships within the Blechnaceae family. Goudaea chrysostachys is a distinct species within this family, with its own set of characteristics that set it apart from other beech ferns.
